SEARCH
Package grafioschtrader.entities

Class AlgoRecommendation

java.lang.Object
grafiosch.entities.BaseID<Integer>
grafiosch.entities.TenantBaseID
grafioschtrader.entities.AlgoRecommendation
All Implemented Interfaces:
Serializable
@Entity public class AlgoRecommendation extends TenantBaseID implements Serializable
Trading signals and rebalancing recommendations generated by strategy evaluation or simulation. Lifecycle: a recommendation is created with a type, target units, and price; once the user acts on it (or the simulation auto-executes), executedAt is set and idTransaction links to the resulting transaction.
See Also:
